name: codex-room-bridge
description: Repo-local Codex plugin for controlling the georg demo over the local HTTP and agent WebSocket APIs.

interface.shortDescription: Control the georg room from Codex over a local MCP server and bridge private deltas.
interface.longDescription: Repo-local plugin for the hackathon demo. It starts a local stdio MCP server that talks to georg's HTTP API on localhost, so Codex can create rooms, join as owner, inspect snapshots, draft and approve ADRs, generate plans, and ship handoffs. It also keeps the live bridge commands for private agent deltas over /agent-ws.
defaultPrompt: Create a new georg room and join me as the decision owner.
Inspect the current room snapshot and tell me the next gated action.
Submit a private delta to the room and promote it if it helps.
